items.title: Digital Asset raises $355 million to expand Canton network as institutional onchain infrastructure
items.summary: HSBC, BNP Paribas, Citadel Securities, CME Ventures and Broadridge among investors backing latest round as focus shifts to regulated blockchain market infrastructure.

items.title: BNY joins Finstreet and ADI Foundation on UAE digital asset custody initiative
items.summary: ADGM-anchored collaboration will initially focus on Bitcoin and Ethereum custody, with plans to expand into stablecoins and tokenised real-world assets.

items.title: Chainlink and Apex Group among consortium to complete Bermuda digital asset compliance initiative
items.summary: The two firms collaborate with Bluprynt and Hacken on the project, bringing together multiple components to address ‘key supervisory challenges’.

items.title: Northern Trust flags digital asset momentum as Q1 servicing fees hit $740.5m
items.summary: Assets under custody/administration hold at $18.6 trillion as market tailwinds and client activity support growth.

items.title: Zodia Custody partners with PwC UK on digital asset custody for insolvency cases
items.summary: Collaboration reflects the growing need for institutional-grade safeguards as crypto assets feature more prominently in distressed estates.

items.title: BNY hires new lead for digital asset transfer agency build-out
items.summary: Executive brings nearly a decade of digital asset experience, with senior roles across Santander, Citi and EY.

items.title: Standard Chartered hires global head of transaction services and digital assets
items.summary: Newly created role brings together transaction banking, securities services and digital assets capabilities within corporate and investment banking.

items.title: Fragmentation threatens digital asset scale, warn DTCC, Clearstream and Euroclear
items.summary: The post-trade giants call for a ‘same asset, same rights, same outcome’ approach to linking TradFi and DLT.

items.title: Standard Chartered appointed digital asset custodian by TP ICAP
items.summary: Bank to also provide settlement services as institutional crypto infrastructure continues to evolve.

items.title: Digital Asset leads fourth cross-border intra-day repo on Canton
items.summary: Intraday repo round sees participation from LSEG, DTCC, Euroclear, Societe Generale, amongst other consortium members.

items.title: HSBC appoints global head of digital asset product for securities services
items.summary: Former Northern Trust executive with nearly 20 years at the firm brings extensive digital assets and product execution experience.

items.title: State Street unveils flagship digital asset platform
items.summary: New infrastructure supports tokenised money market funds, ETFs, deposits and stablecoins across public and private blockchain networks.

items.title: Zodia Custody to support Australian dollar stablecoin AUDM
items.summary: The digital assets custodian, backed by Standard Chartered and Northern Trust, adds support for Macropod’s Australian dollar-backed stablecoin, giving institutional clients secure access to the token for payments and settlement use cases.

items.title: BNY accelerates digital asset push with tokenised deposits
items.summary: By enabling tokenised representations of client deposit balances on its Digital Assets platform, BNY’s institutional clients will be able to move cash while retaining regulatory and reporting integrity.

items.title: DTCC and Digital Asset tokenise DTC-custodied US treasuries on Canton Network
items.summary: The initiative represents an early phase of DTCC’s broader strategy to make DTC-custodied assets accessible on-chain.

items.title: Standard Chartered and Coinbase broaden digital asset partnership
items.summary: Firms to assess opportunities across trading, prime, custody and staking services.

items.title: Standard Chartered rolls out custody solution with digital assets as collateral
items.summary: Standard Chartered has partnered with GFO-X to provide institutional clients with a custody solution for using digital assets as collateral in a fully cleared model – reportedly a world-first in regulated and centrally cleared digital asset derivatives.

items.title: BNY among investors in fresh Digital Asset funding round
items.summary: New backing highlights institutional momentum behind the Canton Network.

items.title: Standard Chartered appointed digital asset custodian for 21Shares
items.summary: The appointment supports custody of crypto ETPs via the Luxembourg-based regulated platform.

items.title: Standard Chartered and OKX extend digital assets partnership to European Economic Area
items.summary: Expansion builds on UAE launch to cover custody and trading across new markets.

items.title: Lack of clear standards threatens digital asset custody, warns Sibos panel
items.summary: Representatives from the DTCC, Citi and Zodia Custody mull the fragmentation challenges that are still holding back the digital asset space.

items.title: Institutional investors are ‘rewiring their operating models around digital assets’, according to State Street
items.summary: Institutional investors are moving beyond experimentation to execution, as tokenisation and AI reshape investment strategies, notes State Street’s latest study.

items.title: DTCC appoints managing director of digital assets from Soc Gen
items.summary: With over two decades of experience in securities and banking operations, the new managing director will support DTCC’s digital assets strategy.

items.title: Digital Asset and consortium complete on-chain US Treasury Financing transaction
items.summary: The transaction, which allows for on-chain financing of UST against USDC, was executed via Tradeweb and is set to pave the way for 24/7 global trading access to high quality liquidity assets.
